title: Turkish Kofte Kebab with Potato and Icli
description: A traditional Turkish kofte kebab recipe with crispy potato wedges and spicy icli sauce, perfect for a flavorful dinner.

ingredients.name: Turkish Kofte Mix
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Soak potato wedges in cold water for 30 minutes.
Drain and pat dry potato wedges with paper towels.
Thread Turkish Kofte Mix onto skewers.
Brush potato wedges with olive oil and season with salt.
Grill potato wedges for 10-12 minutes or until crispy.
Grill kofte for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve kofte with grilled potato wedges and Icli Sauce on the side.
Garnish with chopped onion and serve hot.
